title: DIRECTOR
description:
We are seeking an accomplished Director – Technical & Commercial to provide executive leadership and strengthen our technical and commercial operations. The position requires a senior professional with extensive FPSO  and Offshore experience and a proven record of managing complex engineering and commercial functions.

Key Responsibilities

Provide strategic leadership and oversight across all technical and commercial domains of the company.

Direct and supervise engineering, construction, integration, and commissioning activities for FPSO projects.

Drive business expansion initiatives, identify new commercial opportunities, and support sustainable organizational growth.

Ensure full compliance with contractual, regulatory, and commercial frameworks, including drafting, reviewing, and managing complex oil and gas agreements.

Maintain strict adherence to Brazilian regulatory and operational requirements, including:

Brazilian Navy (Marinha do Brasil) compliance, ANP (Agência Nacional do Petróleo) regulations, NRs (Normas Regulamentadoras) and NORMAM maritime standards

Candidate Profile

Minimum 25 years of experience in the oil and gas industry, with substantial exposure to FPSO engineering, construction, and operations.

Strong technical foundation in process engineering, construction, integration, commissioning, and offshore operations.

Demonstrated capability in commercial management, business development, and organizational growth.

In‑depth understanding of oil and gas contracts, regulatory frameworks, and compliance obligations.

Proven experience working with Brazilian authorities, regulatory bodies, and Petrobras.

Regulatory & Compliance Responsibilities

Ensure full compliance with Brazilian regulatory frameworks governing FPSO units, including ANP, NRs, NORMAM, IBAMA, and Local Content (REPETRO) requirements.

Manage regulatory compliance procedures, philosophies, specifications, and documentation required for license's, permits, and operational consents.

Develop, implement, and maintain company policies and procedures arising from new laws, regulations, and operational requirements.

Lead the rollout and training of new or updated policies, directives, and compliance frameworks.

Manage client interfaces for regulatory validation, safety case submissions, and compliance support.

Technical & Operational Competencies

Regulatory Framework Management: Expert knowledge of Brazilian offshore regulatory regimes (ANP, NRs, NORMAM).

Asset Integrity & Compliance: Oversight of FPSO construction, integration, and operational audits to ensure safety and integrity.

Local Content Compliance: Management of REPETRO and related local content obligations.

Technical Compliance: Assurance of compliance for lifting equipment, pressure vessels, electrical systems (NR‑10), and other critical equipment.

Authority & Classification Interface: Effective liaison with regulatory bodies, classification societies, and client representatives.

Operational Excellence: Extensive experience in process plant operations, water injection systems, commissioning, start‑up, and offshore operations.

Additional Requirements

Exceptional leadership, communication, and stakeholder‑management capabilities.

Demonstrated ability to diversify business operations and develop new ventures in emerging sectors.

Strong proficiency in relevant engineering and commercial software systems, with the ability to meet client expectations while safeguarding organizational interests.
